auth.tagline: Sign in to track your Voowork.

timer.clickToStart: Select project and task to start
timer.noProjects: No assigned projects. Ask your manager for access or sync after signing in.

idle.noActivityDescription: Confirm that you are still working. Otherwise, time will count as inactive.
idle.pausedDescription: Tracking continues, but this period counts as inactive — not active work.
idle.manualWorkDescription: We detected activity on your computer while the timer was paused. Resume tracking and count this time?

buffer.title: Are you still working?
buffer.description: We detected about {{minutes}} min of activity with the app open. Start the timer to log this time to the selected task.

inputMonitoring.title: Permission required
inputMonitoring.description: Voowork needs to monitor keyboard and mouse input to track your activity. Go to System Settings and enable Input Monitoring for Voowork.

activeWindow.title: Screen Recording permission
activeWindow.description: Voowork needs Screen Recording permission to detect when you are in meetings and track which apps you use. Go to System Settings and enable Screen Recording for Voowork.
